SECURE

Intelligent Facility Management

The trusted platform for facility managers, building owners, and property managers. Privacy-first security, operational excellence, and smart building automation.

Explore SolutionsLatest Insights
ISO 27001 / SOC 2 Certified
01 / Features

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

No. 01New

ImageR AI Package Tracking

Automatically scan and log packages with AI-powered image recognition. Reduce manual entry by 90%.

No. 02Popular

Mobile Resident App

Book amenities, submit maintenance requests, and stay connected with your community from anywhere.

No. 03Security

KeyLink Biometric Access

Secure key management with fingerprint authentication, smart tags, and complete audit trails.

No. 04IoT

Aware Sensor Network

Real-time monitoring for water leaks, HVAC issues, and equipment failures with instant alerts.

No. 05Governance

E-Voting & Virtual AGMs

Run board elections and annual general meetings digitally with secure, verifiable voting.

02 / Solutions

CORE PLATFORMS

Click any platform to explore features and capabilities.

Experience

Resident Portal

Mobile app for amenity booking, announcements, parking permits, and community bulletin board for resident engagement.

01
Operations

Maintenance Hub

Centralized work orders, preventative maintenance scheduling, asset directories, and inventory tracking.

02
Front Desk

Concierge Desk

AI-powered package tracking (ImageR), incident reporting, digital shift logs, and visitor management.

03
Security

KeyLink

Physical key management with biometric fingerprint scanners, smart tags, and complete audit trails.

04
Sensors

Aware IoT

Real-time monitoring for water leaks, mechanical malfunctions, and automated alerts to staff.

05
Board Tools

Governance

Virtual meetings, e-voting solutions for board decisions, and AGM facilitation tools.

06
03 / Pillars

CORE PILLARS

01 / OPERATIONAL

OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE

Streamlined HVAC maintenance, energy management, and building automation that reduces costs and maximizes efficiency.

02 / SECURITY

SECURITY & PRIVACY

End-to-end encryption, access control, and compliance with building safety regulations to protect residents and assets.

03 / SUSTAINABLE

SUSTAINABLE BUILDINGS

LEED certification support, carbon footprint tracking, and green building standards for environmentally responsible operations.

04 / SMART

SMART MODERNIZATION

PropTech integration and IoT retrofitting to transform legacy buildings into intelligent, connected environments.

05 / Pricing

CHOOSE YOUR PLAN

Scalable pricing for facilities of all sizes. All plans include core security features and compliance tools.

Essential

For small buildings and HOAs

$2.50/unit/month
  • Resident portal & mobile app
  • Amenity booking system
  • Maintenance request tracking
  • Community announcements
  • Package notifications
  • Email & chat support
